# Use Case Source Document

## 1. Purpose

This document describes the daily operator use cases for business analysts.

## 2. Authentication Requirements

The system shall require users to authenticate before accessing protected resources.
All authentication attempts must be logged with timestamp and user identifier.

## 3. Traceability Requirements

The system shall maintain a traceability matrix linking requirements to source documents.
Each requirement must reference the originating section of the source document.
Traceability links must be verified automatically during the CI/CD pipeline.
